calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-29-2008 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-16-2008 Continued To Jun-06-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Apr-22-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, 3689.

Roger T. Ritter, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Gordon & Rees LLP, a Limited Liability Partnership.
No appearance by defendant Tan Kai Pascal Siekmann.
Default entered against defendant Tai Kai Pascal Siekmann on January 25. 2008.
Doe defendants dismissed March 10, 2008.
Order granting waiver of witness appearance at prove-up hearing filed March 7, 2008.
Defendants Biodata Systems GMBH and Klaus Platen were dismissed on March 10, 2008.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Gordon & Rees LLP, a Limited Liability Partnership, and against the Defaulted Defendant Tan Kai Pascal Siekmann as follows:

Damages/Principal - $211,307.69.
Prejudgment Interest - $108,343.37.
Costs $3,130.92, for a total of $322,781.98.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-04-2008 Continued To Apr-25-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-30-2007 Continued To Feb-15-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212

Default Prove-Up In Scd.
Off Calendar May-15-2007 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up In Scd.
Off Calendar Feb-27-2007 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Patrick Heard.
Roger Ritter, Esq. for Plaintiff: Gordon Rees LLP, a limited liability partnership.
After hearing the evidence presented, matter is taken off calendar, not all Defendants defaulted, and pending dismissal of the remaining Defendants.
